close_reason: Documented ~64 KiB max value size in module-level rustdoc
description: README.md describes URI shape and put()/get() semantics but does not mention the 65535-byte ceiling on stored values inherited from wolfhsm's u16 length field. Users discover at runtime via a generic Backend error. Add a 'Size limits' section to README and a sentence to the rustdoc top-of-crate.
title: README does not document the ~64KiB max value size of wolfHSM NVM objects
